# CLI Reference

*The complete `copick` command-line interface.*

## Data Management

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| [`add`](add/index.md) | Add entities to copick projects. |
| [`cp`](cp.md) | Copy or duplicate copick objects by URI. |
| [`export`](export/index.md) | Export copick data to external formats. |
| [`mv`](mv.md) | Move/rename copick objects by URI. |
| [`new`](new/index.md) | Create copick entities. |
| [`rm`](rm.md) | Remove copick objects by URI. |
| [`sync`](sync/index.md) | Synchronize data between Copick projects. |

## Data Processing

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| [`convert`](convert/index.md) | Convert one copick type to another. |
| [`inference`](inference/index.md) | Run inference on copick tomograms. |
| [`logical`](logical/index.md) | Perform logical operations on copick objects. |
| [`process`](process/index.md) | Apply processing methods to copick data. |
| [`training`](training/index.md) | Train a model with copick data. |

## Utilities

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| [`browse`](browse.md) | Browse Copick projects. |
| [`config`](config/index.md) | Create and manage copick configuration files. |
| [`deposit`](deposit.md) | Create a depositable view of a copick project using symlinks. |
| [`download`](download/index.md) | Download data and metadata for STA. |
| [`info`](info.md) | Display information about the Copick CLI. |
| [`setup`](setup/index.md) | Set up and manage external integrations. |
| [`stats`](stats/index.md) | Gather statistics about a copick project. |
